examples.title: Value Iteration
examples.code:
function VALUE_ITERATION(S, A, P, R, γ, ε):
  Initialize V(s) = 0 ∀s∈S
  repeat
    Δ ← 0
    for each s in S:
      v ← V(s)
      V(s) ← max_a [ R(s,a) + γΣ P(s'|s,a)V(s') ]
      Δ ← max(Δ, |v - V(s)|)
  until Δ < ε
  return V
examples.explanation: Iteratively applies Bellman optimality operator until convergence
